rows.label: tev021101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev021101_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Ciska about flight
conditions on Mira.

rows.label: tev021101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev021101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ciska about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Ciska about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021101_SEL1011
rows.name:
Ask Ciska about flight
conditions on Mira.

rows.label: tev021101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Ciska about recent developments.

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Besides the abnormal weather, unusual
kinds of electromagnetic waves are
abundant in the skies of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Radar systems that were designed
for use on Earth go haywire as
soon as we start them up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0003
rows.name:
So without an extremely skilled pilot,
even a perfectly maintained helicopter
is going to crash shortly after takeoff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Of course when you're as good as I
am, it's no big deal. I don't even
need radar—intuition is enough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0010
rows.name:
We got another request from the
Grenada Galactic Group, and I'm
raring to get started on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0011
rows.name:
But Howard always says, "Until
your preparations are flawless,
you're not going anywhere."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Howard is an obsessive perfectionist,
and it makes it impossible to
finish anything around here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0013
rows.name:
How I wish I could have teamed
up with a nice respectable
BLADE like you instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Roscoll's always ordering me to get along
with Howard, but you can't just make a decree
like that and expect anything to change.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0020
rows.name:
Earlier, my BLADE friend Anna and
I were talking about how great it
would be to go to a spa together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0021
rows.name:
But NLA doesn't have a single one, which seems
nuts. I mean, we have bars, right? And spas are
way more important than some stupid drunk hole![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG0022
rows.name:
Plus, if they DID ever build some kind of spa in
the commercial district, Anna and I would go there
preeetty much every day, which helps the economy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Besides the abnormal weather, unusual
kinds of electromagnetic waves are
abundant in the skies of Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1002
rows.name:
Radar systems that were designed
for use on Earth go haywire as
soon as we start them up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1003
rows.name:
So you have to pay extremely close attention to
every little detail when it comes to keeping a
helicopter up in the air. I knew that, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1010
rows.name:
Before missions, Howard always
ordered me to fix anything that
was even slightly scuffed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1011
rows.name:
Otherwise, he'd say, you never know what might go
wrong. He yelled at me about that sort of thing
so many times...and I always fought him on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1012
rows.name:
But Howard was right. This
happened because I always let
the little things slide.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1013
rows.name:
I want so badly to apologize to him—to tell
him I'm sorry for refusing to learn the lesson
he was trying so desperately to teach me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev021101_MSG1014
rows.name:
But it's too late. All I can do
now is live his lesson so that
his efforts aren't wasted.[ST:wait ]
